$note: Per-project pipeline behavior. Loaded into every agent (via context-map 'always'). Agents/orchestrator HONOR these values instead of hardcoding them. Edit per project; no prompt edits needed.

$docs.gates.auto_pass: true = orchestrator auto-approves a gate when its audit has 0 blockers (still stops on any blocker). false = always require explicit human approve.
$docs.coverage.diff_threshold: % of CHANGED lines that must be covered (developer S4 gate).
$docs.security.stride_analysis: auto = run STRIDE threat-model only when the feature touches auth/payment/PII; always = every feature; never = skip. Honored by analyst (early risk) + qa.
$docs.test_framework: auto = use the framework in context/stack.md; or pin one (e.g. vitest, jest, playwright, pytest, phpunit).
$docs.sonar_scan: true = run a SonarQube quality gate in S4 if configured; false = skip.
